title: 11-idt dms filter, electroacoustic filter and multiplexer
abstract: An improved DMS filter with 11 IDTs and three-dimensional electrode structures (L1,L2,L3) for line crossings between a first port and a second port is provided. Ground connections of IDTs are realized with an upper metal layer (L3, IIC3, IIC4, IMS) passing via an intermediate insulating layer (L2) over signal wirings. Signal connections of IDTs are multi layered and realized in a lower metal layer (L1, IIC1, IIC2, LMS) and an upper metal layer (L3,IIC1, IIC2, UMS). The upper metal layer of signal wirings may partly overlap the insulating layer (L2).
claims:
Claims Claims l. li-IDT DMS filter, comprising - a first port and a second port, - a first acoustic reflector and a second acoustic reflector, - 6 first IDTs and 5 second IDTs, all 11 IDTs being arranged between the first and the second acoustic reflector, wherein - the first IDTs are electrically connected to the first port, - the second IDTs are electrically connected to the second port. 2. 11-IDT DMS filter of the previous claim, further comprising a first inter IDT connection and a second inter IDT connection, wherein - each IDT has a first busbar and a first connection and a second busbar and a second connection, - the first busbars and connections of the first IDTs are electrically connected via the first inter IDT connection, - the second busbars and connections of the second IDTs are electrically connected via the second inter IDT connection. 3. 11-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, wherein the first and the second inter IDT connection comprise a lower metal strip and an upper metal strip. 4. 11-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, further comprising 

 - a third inter IDT connection and a fourth inter IDT connection, wherein each of the third inter IDT connection and the fourth inter IDT connection comprises an inner metal strip. 5Â· li-IDT DMS filter of the previous claim, wherein - the third inter IDT connection electrically connects the first busbars and connections of the second transducers and - the fourth inter IDT connection electrically connects the second busbars and connections of the first transducers. 6. li-IDT DMS filter of one of the two previous claims, further comprising - insulating patches between the third inter IDT connection and the first connections of the first IDTs and - insulating patches between the fourth inter IDT connection and the second connections of the second IDTs. 7. 11-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, wherein each second IDT is arranged between two first IDTs in a linear arrangement. 8. 11-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, wherein the footprint of the IDTs have a symmetry with respect to a symmetry line perpendicular to a direction of SAW propagation. 9. 11-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, wherein the first IDTs are input IDTs and the second IDTs are output IDTs. 

10. li-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, further comprising a multi layer TCF structure. li. li-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims, being a TF-SAW DMS filter. 12. Electroacoustic filter, comprising an n-IDT DMS filter of one of the previous claims. 13. Multiplexer, comprising the electroacoustic filter of the previous claim.
